item.name: Save the Princess
item.description:
For every person who has ever dreamed of owning a wheeled, spindly legged, trumpet-blowing mammet, there is this wheeled, spindly legged, trumpet-blowing mammet.

Use item to acquire the Save the Princess minion.
item.tooltip:
How is our little princess doing?
   - Serendipity
item.specialactiondescription: Grants 10 action points to all allies within range who do not have similar actions.
